topics.name: ML Foundations
topics.story_hook: A child learns 'cat' from seeing dozens of cats. Machine learning is that, but formalized: show the machine examples, let it find the pattern.

exercises.title: Compute accuracy, precision, recall by hand

topics.mini_project: Classify iris flowers using only numpy — no sklearn.

topics.name: Linear Regression
topics.story_hook: If ice cream sales go up when the weather's hot, you could draw a line that predicts sales from temperature. Linear regression is the math that draws the best line.
topics.mini_project: Predict Bangalore house prices from area + bedrooms + location.

topics.name: Classification (Logistic Regression, SVM, Trees)
topics.story_hook: Regression predicts a number. Classification predicts a label. 'Spam or not?' is the classic example.

exercises.title: Compare SVM kernels: linear, RBF, poly

topics.mini_project: Credit card fraud detector with class imbalance handling.

topics.name: Neural Networks
topics.story_hook: A neural network is a logistic regression stacked on another logistic regression stacked on another — infinitely composable. That's what makes it so powerful.

exercises.title: Backprop by hand on a 2-layer net
Save and load a trained model

topics.mini_project: Handwritten digit recognizer with a live drawing UI.

topics.name: CNNs & Transformers
topics.story_hook: CNNs learn to see. Transformers learn to read. Together they power everything from self-driving cars to ChatGPT.

exercises.title: LoRA fine-tuning on a small dataset

topics.mini_project: An image captioning model using a CNN encoder + transformer decoder.
